```protobuf
rpc SynchronizerTimeService.AwaitTime(com.digitalasset.canton.time.admin.v30.AwaitTimeRequest) returns (com.digitalasset.canton.time.admin.v30.AwaitTimeResponse);
```

**Signature**

```protobuf
rpc SynchronizerTimeService.FetchTime(com.digitalasset.canton.time.admin.v30.FetchTimeRequest) returns (com.digitalasset.canton.time.admin.v30.FetchTimeResponse);
```

fetch the synchronizer time which has been received within a supplied freshness bound defined by the local clock
